name: @spectyra/desktop
description: Spectyra Desktop — Electron shell + Local Companion (child process)
author: Spectyra

scripts.build: pnpm run compile:electron && pnpm run prepare:companion && pnpm run build:renderer
scripts.dist: pnpm run build && node scripts/clean-release.cjs && electron-builder --publish never
scripts.dist:win: pnpm run build && node scripts/clean-release.cjs && electron-builder --win --publish never
